utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists five items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items. Each item contains the required details: (1) health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and features; (2) property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs and features; (3) travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs and features; (4) additional_services includes enhancement services with costs and features; and (5) total_budget provides a full monthly and annual breakdown. All entries are fully specified with details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan chosen by the AI assistant includes four main providers/policies, all under 'LifeFirst'. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, I matched each coverage element to the closest ground-truth item with the same provider and coverage type. For health_coverage.physical_health, the provider 'LifeFirst' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (rating 8). For health_coverage.mental_health, the provider 'LifeFirst' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health (rating 8). For property_coverage, 'LifeFirst' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content (rating 8). For travel_coverage, 'LifeFirst' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (rating 7). The additional_services section lists 'gym reimbursement', 'travel assistance', and 'concierge advisory'. The closest matches in the ground-truth enhancement services are: 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 6), '24/7 Travel Assistance' (rating 10), and 'Concierge Services' (rating 8).
